TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1940 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 23 a romi'ad masofoc ci Mamnoon Hussain , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Pakistan anini i ci Mamnoon Hussain, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 9 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i mamno~uo~un ńßo~u~ussain , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u pakistan anini i ¶i mamno~uo~un ńßo~u~ussain, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1940 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 23 a romi'ad masofoc ci Mamnoon Hussain , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Pakistan anini i ci Mamnoon Hussain, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 9 a romi'ad.
